name: Azores, Portugal
blurb: Five islands' worth of waterfalls, tea terraces and cliff road.

posts.caption: Monte Palace Hotel
posts.alt: Aerial view of the abandoned Monte Palace Hotel standing above the Sete Cidades lake, São Miguel, Azores

posts.caption: Gorreana Tea Plantation
posts.alt: Curved terraced rows of the Gorreana tea plantation, São Miguel, Azores

posts.caption: Waterfall lagoon
posts.alt: Dozens of thin waterfalls falling down a green cliff face into a still lagoon, Azores

posts.caption: Clifftop trail
posts.alt: A narrow footpath cut into a green clifftop high above the Atlantic, Azores

posts.caption: Ravine waterfall
posts.alt: A stream falling through a densely overgrown green ravine, Azores

name: Finland — Lapland
blurb: Short days, floodlit pistes, and a lot of snow on the trees.

posts.caption: Last run of the day
posts.alt: A skier on a floodlit piste among snow-covered trees at dusk, Ruka, Lapland, Finland

posts.caption: Up the lift
posts.alt: Two skiers in helmets and goggles riding a lift above the snow, Ruka, Lapland, Finland

posts.caption: After dark
posts.alt: Aerial view of a lit road running through a snowy resort village at night, Lapland, Finland

posts.caption: Bridge in the snow
posts.alt: A footbridge crossing a frozen river through deep snow-covered forest, Lapland, Finland

name: Lofoten, Norway
blurb: Beaches that have no business being that colour this far north.

posts.caption: Above the beach
posts.alt: Two people on a clifftop looking down at a turquoise beach far below, Lofoten, Norway

posts.caption: Beach road
posts.alt: Kristi Leka standing on the road beside a wide Lofoten beach at dusk, mountains behind, Norway

posts.caption: Fog on the ridge
posts.alt: A lone figure standing on a ridge in golden fog with the sun breaking through, Lofoten, Norway

name: Iceland
blurb: Black sand, green canyons, weather that changes its mind hourly.

posts.caption: Black sand coast
posts.alt: A black sand beach meeting a steep dark mountain under low cloud, Iceland

posts.caption: Canyon viewpoint
posts.alt: Two people at a viewpoint above a green canyon with a waterfall running through it, Iceland

posts.caption: Waterfall from above
posts.alt: Aerial view of a waterfall dropping into a mossy green canyon, Iceland

name: Svalbard
blurb: 78° north. Polar bear signs at the edge of town.

posts.caption: Global Seed Vault
posts.alt: The illuminated entrance of the Svalbard Global Seed Vault glowing turquoise against the snow

posts.caption: Distances from Longyearbyen
posts.alt: The Longyearbyen signpost showing distances to world cities, beside a polar bear warning sign, Svalbard

posts.caption: Off the ship
posts.alt: A person at a ship's railing looking out at an Arctic fjord and bare mountainside, Svalbard

name: Faroe Islands
blurb: The best cliffs on the list, and the worst weather to shoot them in.

posts.caption: Sea stack and arch
posts.alt: A sea stack with a natural arch standing off a green headland, Faroe Islands

posts.caption: Cliff wall
posts.alt: Sunlit layered sea cliffs dropping straight into deep blue ocean, Faroe Islands

posts.caption: The gorge
posts.alt: Aerial view of surf pushing through a narrow sea gorge between green cliffs, Faroe Islands

posts.caption: Waterfall to the sea
posts.alt: A tall waterfall falling through a green bowl down toward the sea, Faroe Islands

posts.caption: Watching the cliffs
posts.alt: Two people sitting on a grassy edge looking across towering layered sea cliffs, Faroe Islands

posts.caption: River to the fjord
posts.alt: A river winding through a green valley out toward the fjord, Faroe Islands

name: Tenerife
blurb: Pine forest at altitude, surf at the bottom of the cliff.

posts.caption: Cliffs and surf
posts.alt: Aerial view of coastal cliffs with white surf and turquoise water, Tenerife

posts.caption: The forest road
posts.alt: A straight road running through tall pine forest, Tenerife

posts.caption: Trailhead
posts.alt: Two people resting on a wooden rail with dry volcanic hills behind, Tenerife

name: Madeira
blurb: Stairs cut into a ridge, and a very long way down either side.

posts.caption: Stairway to Heaven
posts.alt: Stone steps climbing a knife-edge volcanic ridge, Madeira

posts.caption: Turquoise surf
posts.alt: Aerial view of waves breaking turquoise against dark cliffs, Madeira

name: Me
blurb: This is me — the ones I am in, rather than the ones I took.

posts.caption: The Great Wall
posts.alt: Kristi Leka standing on the Great Wall of China in low golden light

posts.caption: Florence
posts.alt: Kristi Leka walking in front of the Duomo of Santa Maria del Fiore, Florence, Italy

posts.caption: The Vasa
posts.alt: Kristi Leka standing in front of the seventeenth-century warship Vasa at the Vasa Museum in Stockholm, Sweden

posts.caption: Ice cave
posts.alt: Kristi Leka standing at the mouth of a blue glacier ice cave

posts.caption: Christmas lights
posts.alt: Portrait of Kristi Leka walking down a shopping street strung with Christmas lights

posts.caption: Across the water
posts.alt: Kristi Leka on a boardwalk with snow-covered mountains rising across the water behind

posts.caption: Fortress walk
posts.alt: Kristi Leka walking a cobbled path beside a fortress wall in autumn

posts.caption: Glacial water
posts.alt: Kristi Leka standing on the shore of a turquoise glacial lake below bare mountains

posts.caption: Mossy gorge
posts.alt: Kristi Leka sitting in a green mossy gorge below a snow-capped peak

posts.caption: Badlands
posts.alt: Kristi Leka standing on eroded, terraced badlands under a pale sky

posts.caption: Clifftop
posts.alt: Kristi Leka on a green clifftop above a rocky coastline

posts.caption: Above the sea
posts.alt: Kristi Leka sitting on a roadside guardrail above the sea with a green headland behind

posts.caption: Low cloud on the shore
posts.alt: Kristi Leka on a rocky shoreline as cloud rolls over the headland behind, Faroe Islands

posts.caption: Edge of the island
posts.alt: Kristi Leka sitting on a grassy clifftop above the open sea, Madeira
